THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AQUINO, DERIK ENDERSON ESCOBAR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CALDERON III, RIGO ANTONIO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2018 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO APR-12-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF DERIK ESCOBAR AQUINO IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH COURT INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE #300563. ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-12-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-12-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF DERIK ESCOBAR AQUINO IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH COURT INTERPRETER CLIFFORD HENDERSON #301433. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS SUPPOSE TO BRING THE PROCESS SERVER TO TODAY'S HEARING AND PLAINTIFF WAS NOT ABLE TO BRING THE SERVER. HONORABLE CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS DETERMINED THE PROOF OF SERVICE ON 2/9 IS ACCEPTABLE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
